findings.root_cause: check_meta_tooler_gap() only scanned 3 files (check.sh, orient.py, maintenance.py), missing periodics.json+CLAUDE.md+SWARM.md

fix_3_threshold.reason: 28/80 = 35% unreferenced is normal for mature swarm with standalone user-invocable tools

expect: >=50% archive candidates; <=10 need wiring; count drops to <70
actual: 11% archived (4/36); reference scan widened (4 recovered); threshold made percentage-based. 80 active tools, 28 standalone.
diff: Expected >=50% archive — got 11% (most tools are legitimate standalone). Expected count <70 — got 80 (threshold fix instead of mass archive). Root cause was measurement error (narrow scan), not tool bloat.
